name: Arkose Labs
description: Arkose Labs is a fraud prevention and bot detection platform that uses risk-based authentication challenges. Their MatchKey technology presents users with interactive puzzles (such as image matching) to distinguish between human users and automated bots, without relying on traditional CAPTCHA methods.
advantages: Advanced bot detection beyond traditional CAPTCHA
Risk-based challenge difficulty adapts to threat level
User-friendly puzzles that don't frustrate legitimate users
Protects against account takeover, credential stuffing, and spam
disadvantages: Can add friction to legitimate user sessions
Premium pricing compared to simpler CAPTCHA solutions
Requires integration effort for custom workflows
Some users may find puzzles disruptive
